detail.title: Nov 2025 Product Innovation
detail.content:
Below are this month’s new Seller Center features and enhancements. These updates are designed to help your agency better coach sellers, increase content output, reduce friction, and ultimately drive more GMV. --- # Shoppable Videos ## ⏰ Scheduled Shoppable Videos
**📌 What it is:** Sellers can now create videos in advance and schedule them to publish automatically anytime from 30 minutes to 30 days in advance. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps sellers stay consistent with posting * Ensures videos go live during key shopping moments * Reduces last-minute manual posting ⏩ **Agency action:** Work with sellers to build a weekly posting plan and pre-schedule content. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?identity=1&role=1&knowledge_id=7651565985810231&from=feature_guide). --- ## 🔗 Product Relinking
**📌 What it is:** Sellers can now replace unavailable product links without deleting or reposting their videos. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Prevents loss of GMV when products go out of stock or are delisted * Keeps high-performing content active * Reduces creator downtime or manual content fixes ⏩ **Agency action:** Encourage sellers to check their relink alerts daily and replace unavailable SKUs immediately. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?from=feature_guide&identity=1&knowledge_id=3759443559679790&role=2). --- ## 🎥 Video Assistant: AI-Powered Content Creation
**📌 What it is:** An AI-powered tool inside Creator Center that helps sellers create high-performing shoppable videos faster. It guides them through scripting, filming, editing, and posting, all in one simple workflow. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps sellers create more content with less effort and support * Improves quality and consistentcy * Great for scaling sellers efficiently ⏩ **Agency action:** Recommend Video Assistant for sellers who need help ideating or scripting. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=4940922363217678&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- ## 🎤 Lipsync Dubbing
**📌 What it is:** An AI dubbing tool that translates and lip-syncs seller videos into multiple languages. It matches lip movement automatically, adds translated voiceover, and generates localized scripts, allowing sellers to repurpose one video into different markets without reshooting. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Quick way to localize or upgrade content * No need to reshoot videos in different languages * Improves engagement and conversion ⏩ **Agency action:** Recommend to sellers expanding across regions or repurposing content. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=1401044627343118&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- ## 💡 Good Content Performance Insights
**📌 What it is:** The Good Quality Video Guide now has enhanced performance insights and guidance to help sellers improve their video performance faster. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Clearer guidance for coaching sellers * Helps sellers understand what's working and why * Identifies performance gaps quickly ⏩ **Agency action:** Use insights during content reviews to advise sellers on what to change or scale. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=4963086610204471). --- # Merchandising ## 🧩 Combined Listings
**📌 What it is:** A feature that lets sellers manually create their own "More Choices" or "More Versions" section on a product page. Sellers can now group related products (sizes, colors, flavors) under one listing, rather than relying only on auto-generated combinations. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Improves product discoverability * Consolidates reviews to improve trust * Reduces duplicate listings that confuse shoppers ⏩ **Agency action:** Audit seller catalogs and combine duplicate or related SKUs to strengthen conversion. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=6102275286288183&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- ## 📈 Hero Program: 7-Day Ads Challenge
**📌 What it is:** A built-in 7-day guided ads challenge for scaling a hero product. Sellers receive step-by-step directions on how to invest in ads and can earn up to $1,000 in TikTok Shop-funded bonuses if they hit the weekly performance target. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Teaches sellers how to use Shop Ads in a structured way * Reduces setup complexity for agencies * Provides seller motivation through guaranteed bonus incentives ⏩ **Agency action:** Select proven hero SKUs for entry and support sellers with daily check-ins to hit targets. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=3775315155355438&course_type=1#EB1300D3). --- # **ACE Framework** ## ⭐ Creator Exclusive Price Enter Point
**📌 What it is:** A simplified promotion setup where sellers can create special discounted prices visible only to selected creators for LIVE or video promotions. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Makes it easier for sellers to run reator-friendly promotions * Encourages more creators to feature seller products * Increases reaching during events, launches, or LIVE sessions ⏩ **Agency action:** Help sellers set Creator Exclusive Prices for high-impact SKUs during campaigns. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=1363152974169870). --- # ACE Framework ## 📊 ACE Module in Analytics
**📌 What it is:** A new Analytics module that organizes performance into the ACE framework—Assortment, Content, Empowerment. Sellers can click into each area to see detailed breakdowns and diagnostics. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Provides structured, easy-to-understand performance analysis * Helps pinpoint exactly where sellers need support * Makes reporting and reviews more strategic and streamlined ⏩ **Agency action:** Use ACE to prepare weekly/monthly insight reports and set priority actions. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=2165215329748791&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- # Agency ## 🧭 Enhanced TikTok Shop Partner Service Portal
**📌 What it is:** A revamped portal inside Seller Center that helps sellers find vetted TikTok Shop Partners. It includes clearer service categories, verified performance data, case studies, and easier contact options. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Increases visibility to potential clients * Helps sellers understand agency capabilities * Establishes trust through verified metrics **⏩ Agency action:** Update your agency’s profile, specialties, and success stories to attract more sellers. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=1777027175974698&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- ## 💸 Shop Ads Commission Rate Recommendations
**📌 What it is:** A data-based system that recommends commission rates by analyzing the top-performing 30% of products in a category. Sellers can use these recommendations when setting Shop Ads affiliate rates. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps sellers offer competitive commissions * Increases creator uptake and content volume * Reduces guesswork and misaligned rates ⏩ **Agency action:** Review recommended rates with sellers and adjust to drive creator participation. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=1629118999545613&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- # Working with Affilifates ## 📉 Shop Ads Commission Threshold
**📌 What it is:** A minimum required commission rate that must be met when setting Shop Ads commissions. If a seller sets a rate below the allowed minimum, the system flags it and prompts an adjustment. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Prevents campaigns from underperforming due to low commissions * Ensures creators earn fairly * Maintains strong ecosystem health for affiliate promotions ⏩ **Agency action:** Confirm that seller campaigns meet the threshold before launching. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=7057402168084270#EB4500D2). --- # Logistics & Fulfillment ## 🧮 Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT) Cost Calculator
**📌 What it is:** A calculator that estimates per-unit FBT costs, like inbound fees, storage, and fulfillment, based on product size, weight, and volume. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps sellers understand real margins * Supports decisions on switching to FBT * Prevents unprofitable promo planning ⏩ **Agency action:** Use the calculator during pricing discussions and new product launches. --- ## 🚛 Non-Compliant Instance (NCI) Fee Waiver for First Inbound **📌 What it is:** A one-time waiver that removes all NCI fees on a seller’s first inbound FBT shipment. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Lowers risk for first-time FBT users * Encourages sellers to try TikTok fulfillment * Simplifies onboarding **⏩ Agency action:** Recommend new sellers test FBT using their free first inbound. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://scm-us.tiktok.com/merchant-university/course-details/26939242246). --- # Partner Ecosystem ## 🖥️ Shopify Web Design Integration
**📌 What it is:** A feature in the TikTok for Shopify app that automatically syncs a seller’s storefront design (UI/UX, layout, branding) into TikTok Shop. **Why it matters for agencies:** * Keeps brand presentation consistent * Reduces manual storefront adjustments * Improves shopper trust and conversion **⏩ Agency action:** Help Shopify sellers sync their design and optimize their TikTok Shop layout. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=7805772936890126&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). ---
